chapters.title: 二○○○年夏季训练标语
chapters.content:
新耶路撒冷是涌流之三一神的目的地。
The New Jerusalem is the destination of the flowing Triune God.
我们成为新耶路撒冷，乃是借着享受那经过过程并终极完成的三一神作恩典。
We become the New Jerusalem by enjoying the processed and consummated Triune God as grace.
我们建造新耶路撒冷，乃是借着在神圣的流里，就是在神圣生命的涌流里，与主同工。
We build the New Jerusalem by working with the Lord in the divine stream, the flow of the divine life.
主的恢复乃是要建造锡安，就是基督身体的实际，终极完成于新耶耶路撒冷。
The Lord's recovery is to build up Zion, the reality of the Body of Christ consummating in the New Jerusalem.
